channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Kraken cuts 150 staff amid AI efficiencies, potentially delaying IPO: Report
item.description: Kraken has cut 150 staff due to the rising use of AI, adding to more than 5,000 layoffs across the crypto sector so far this year, Bloomberg reports.

item.title: Crypto security is turning into an AI arms race as agents may overwhelm compliance teams
item.description: AI agents and automated payments could reach a scale that crypto monitoring systems built for human-paced markets cannot handle, Elliptic CEO Simone Maini warned.

item.title: Verus Ethereum bridge reportedly exploited for $11.6M in latest DeFi attack
item.description: Two security companies have flagged the address where the stolen funds are allegedly being held, showing the cryptocurrencies have been converted into 5,402 Ether.

item.title: Aave restores ether borrowing limits after $230 million exploit
item.description: The DeFi lending protocol reversed restrictions imposed after April’s $292 million exploit, restoring borrowing capacity across six networks as contagion fears ease.

item.title: Surging oil prices have been driving Ether selling pressure: Tom Lee
item.description: Fundstrat's Tom Lee pointed out an inverse correlation between crude and Ether as oil surged back to around $110 on Monday.

item.title: Bitcoin Depot, North America's largest bitcoin ATM operator, files for bankruptcy
item.description: Bitcoin Depot, the largest bitcoin ATM operator in North America and publicly listed on Nasdaq, has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy.

item.title: Reports suggest Iran is mulling Hormuz ‘insurance’ scheme, paid in Bitcoin
item.description: Screenshots of a website called “Hormuz Safe” have been circulating on social media, which offers “digital insurance” for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran may be turning the Strait of Hormuz into a bitcoin-based insurance market, local reports say
item.description: State-linked Fars News reported that Iran’s economy ministry has been working on a plan to manage shipping through the Strait with payments in bitcoin.

item.title: Crypto traders betting on a rally lose $563 million in liquidations. Ether and bitcoin suffer the most
item.description: Ether and bitcoin led liquidations, as their prices dropped on macroeconomic concerns.

item.title: Senate crypto bill at risk beyond midterms if not passed by August: NYDIG
item.description: NYDIG’s Greg Cipolaro says the Senate’s crypto market structure bill is at risk of failing if it cannot clear a floor vote by August.

item.title: Analysts debate whether Bitcoin is in ‘sell in May’ bear market setup
item.description: Some analysts argue that a comparatively broadened, institutionalized buyer base for crypto today may prevent a repeat of the drawdowns seen in May 2018 and May 2022.

item.title: WETH markets return to normal operations on Aave amid rsETH recovery progress
item.description: Aave applied a temporary freeze to WETH as a precautionary safety measure in response to the Kelp DAO exploit, alongside freezes on the rsETH and wrsETH reserves.

item.title: HYPE pops 7%, beating bitcoin declines, as SpaceX pre-IPO lands on Hyperliquid
item.description: Hyperliquid's HYPE token rallied 7% over 24 hours after Trade.xyz launched the first pre-IPO perpetual market on the platform, offering synthetic exposure to SpaceX at a reference valuation of $1.78 trillion.

item.title: Yet another crypto bridge falls victim to an $11 million hack
item.description: The latest attack adds to growing string of cross-chain infrastructure exploits.

item.title: Bitcoin slides under $77,000 as oil shock and Treasury yields hit risk assets
item.description: Long-term holders are still sitting tight and exchange balances remain near six-year lows, Binance Research data shows, but underwater short-term holders leave BTC vulnerable to macro shocks.

item.title: 🧵 1/ If one is wondering why Ethereum $ETH has been under selling pressure: - to me, rising oil prices is the biggest headwind - ETH inverse correlation to oil is the highest ever - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9vVUYyT1BrZGk3ZnlpSFBncUg2Z2p0UUs5Z1RiRFVLZHdZSllLUGVtZUt6TEg5RlBNMTdaRFdWalp6VFJvQXZEMGRITnRPQzNFYTloQ3RtM3kxcmlFWDkw?oc=5" target="_blank">🧵 1/ If one is wondering why Ethereum…

item.title: Oh you better put me on solana blockchain, I'm waiting... - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE9KSVllamdIMkRmREVRNlNwVXdncTVYYXhzaUFVdXl3S3l5TkUycG0xQjlxSmZJdk1tb0hkZl9vYUJEcDd1VklpRXRPeVJmZjh6YnRqWGlSM1VyYnpUbkE?oc=5" target="_blank">Oh you better put me on solana blockcha…

item.title: Grayscale, VanEck amend US spot BNB ETF filings, stepping closer to potential launch
item.description: The US securities regulator approved 21Shares’ Hyperliquid ETF last week, adding to a growing number of cryptocurrencies converted into ETF wrappers in the US.

item.title: 🇺🇸 LATEST: White House crypto advisor Patrick Witt says passing the Clarity Act would get the crypto industry roughly 90% of what it needs. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFAyZFQ5TXFNdEFfRGFXcWNlNmRoM1plYUxLZU9qRHJuN2NLVVk2RFdsYWp2QjFUaHNuN3ppRnlzb2YzeFVpWG9aSEVsWjRFRmhsZWU5VTczVEd5MmoyMUFna1lOeFk?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 LATEST: White House crypto…

item.title: 🚨 ALERT: Blockaid has detected an ongoing exploit on the Verus-Ethereum Bridge, with approximately $11.58M drained so far. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE45cXJWdjR2NDRwcXI4d3BZY0sybWF4SWpPOVo1dEJQM1V0ZHc1dTBqRzBLS2hKdUFRaXR0ZmdPd1VVSHlBNElveDZLWEpBWnhBRnRWQW90aHU2WnI5c3lHM1VJbjU?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 ALERT: Blockaid has detected…

item.title: KuCoin Australia’s ‘Evolution’ Showcases Regulatory Focus, Mastercard Launch
item.description: The exchange’s KuCard rollout enables users to make "seamless payments" to Mastercard merchants using USDC.

item.title: 🚨 JUST IN: Over $526M were liquidated from the crypto market in the past hour, with longs taking the hardest hit at $510M as $BTC dropped to $77K. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE8yRXdsVnlLT2JjX19id2RPTTZCWm5TQ0xsaWJyQjV1WVVrUGNiUFQyN2gyb0xHUFQwbmIxU1JSRFJCd0NUcWlsMC1fQWJtVWxKcmh2VlZQWWYtal8zcTBtSlJXUTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 JUST IN: Over $526M were liq…

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls below $77,000 as over $500 million worth of levered long positions are liquidated in 60 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE94VU05SFRmMml4ZTg0d3JnLTdxM1VjMGhnckdHQW9fdHp2WGYybTFzMU1rZU9BaFhBdkdibFIydFFKMXFxcVJVSi0zUjg5UXFTaVZWWjVGVk04NFpkbWZ6YzlpRlJjZw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin falls belo…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bernstein says Figure's Q1 results shows uniqueness of blockchain marketplaces
item.description: Figure Technology Solutions latest quarterly results showed Bernstein analysts how different it is from most balance sheet-based fintech lending platforms.

item.title: What Is Arc? The Stablecoin Blockchain From USDC Issuer Circle
item.description: Arc is a new layer-1 blockchain developed by USDC issuer Circle, designed specifically for stablecoin-native finance.

item.title: CZ: We Still Invest 70%–80% of Our Capital in Blockchain In a May 7 speech at Consensus Miami 2026, Binance founder Changpeng Zhao (CZ) @cz_binance said he and Yzi Labs still allocate 70% to 80% of their capital to blockchain, as it remains their core - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9yWmNsNHllMjVpUW0zS0tyMC04WUU4aUVCajRvd2tWMHhQaFZ6b1VXaERSME5INkZpLTE5VndtYkhGaUY1bDFWOEFJOGZ5UkFSUU1CZUMwMWl5SzdOMVlST3JINA?oc=5" target="_blank">CZ: We Still Invest 70%–80% of O…

item.title: Is Bitcoin being manipulated? Bitcoin dumped 5% after the most bullish crypto legislation in US history passed. It is down $4,100 since the CLARITY Act advanced to a full Senate vote, wiping $80 billion from its market cap and liquidating $980 million in positio - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBHdGxUbG9Pei1LbjlIMFpuYW0tdXRlTW4wV2dfMU5CbDEzNTFWRlljclRDVWstVGZDTWhVMXFXZHZWcG5FM1dSZmRsRU5iYXo0QkE2RTZoLVdzWmVFU3NZazdnMA?oc=5" target="_blank">Is Bitcoin being manipulated? Bi…

item.title: The Clarity Act took a step forward: State of Crypto
item.description: Unpacking Thursday's at-times contentious markup hearing.

item.title: Saylor signals BTC buy as retail holders get push on STRC dividend vote
item.description: Michael Saylor signaled another Bitcoin buy on Sunday while urging retail investors to vote on a proxy measure enabling semi-monthly STRC dividend payouts.

item.title: The current Bitcoin price action doesn't shout for new lows. It's consolidating after a run of 40%. That's very healthy and there shouldn't be a conclusion that we are going to test those lows, yet. The only level that is important and preventing the markets of doing - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBoRi11OHF3S19zTElIUk5KV1k3NFI2elNrdEx0MS1ZZWxEQ2dKWmNCdkc3cEg0R1VOb3VzUXJuczBBX196dDYwQXlVel9OR3pPck04Ym5JZ0lRTUY5MW96dzA1WQ?oc=5" target="_blank">The current Bitcoin price action…

item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBRYlc1MjhXdHBWTlZSNFN1bVA5STBNcEF1MmhRZTd6cUVkTDhETnp6ancxejNhZVJnMTk0QkFXVTBhWTJFTHY2b1AyTm1UbU0wVGMzcVNXMkdhUGdlRTNoNjVCVmo?oc=5" target="_blank">🇹🇭 BUSTED: Thai authorities r…

item.title: Alleged Dream Market Admin Accused of Laundering Crypto Into Gold Bars The U.S. Department of Justice charged German citizen Owe Martin Andresen, the alleged main administrator of darknet marketplace Dream Market, with laundering more than $2 mill - x.com

item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5QZ0JvclVVUUVlbWRzMng0azVZbUhxUjNHUXd4SjJHN3VJMUpZdDlMSU4xbTNDYUFlWmxDamhGVlc3ZG1POWViTTh5Skh3dS1aTnZDWGFyQy10cVYyUG50cklLdDA?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 INSIGHT: SharpLink CEO says …

item.title: DeFi's new front: VerifiedX bets bitcoin's next chapter is programmable, private
item.description: VerifiedX says its Bitcoin sidechain enables programmable, privacy-preserving transactions without synthetic wrappers, targeting growing institutional demand for native DeFi on the original blockchain system.

item.title: Japan's SBI Securities, Rakuten Securities plan to offer crypto investment trusts
item.description: Another 11 companies responded to a survey saying they would consider offering crypto funds once the regulatory environment becomes clear.

item.title: 🚨 BEARISH: 🇺🇸 US Treasury extracted $52,000,000,000 in liquidity from the markets this week. Bad for stocks and crypto. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1abWE2QjloS1NhNXpDMEJNRGtxR0NCRkk1THRIcXVuVmdIdDVjekkxaXJyUUtIeG9yanExZ18tM29YbV9sMUtyUDhZVzZIV2JMcWVrbjRFclNJN1NDWDdDVzZn?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 BEARISH: 🇺🇸 US Treasury extra…

item.title: SBI, Rakuten, Nomura line up to launch crypto investment trusts: Report
item.description: Japan’s biggest brokerages are racing to bring crypto investment trusts to retail investors, as regulators move to formally allow crypto-holding funds by 2028.

item.title: "This time is different.” Nick from @coinbureau on why crypto’s market structure has fundamentally changed. #BinanceOnline - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9VYVBVamlrRHNZaS1pSU91a2lXeEVHLU5DcnZUMXFvRkNMRjNCak9kTEdVZkpXWEhaNVZ3dDBiUTJDeWRKRHBQUTk4bTNLTXB6R2NuMHVFVGhzanZx?oc=5" target="_blank">"This time is different.” Nick from @coinb…

item.title: Bitcoin slides below $79K on macro fears: Can fixed-income outflows save it?
item.description: While macro pain and Iran war uncertainty drag Bitcoin below $79K, fixed-income market outflows could trigger a medium-term Bitcoin rebound.

item.title: Italy’s largest bank more than doubles crypto holdings to $235M in Q1: Report
item.description: Intesa Sanpaolo grew its crypto holdings from $100 million to $235 million in Q1 2026, making first-time moves into Ethereum and XRP while nearly exiting Solana entirely.

item.title: A Russian stablecoin built to dodge sanctions says it can survive even if they're lifted
item.description: A7A5, the Russia-linked stablecoin built to move money around banking restrictions, says faster trade settlement, yield and regional crypto infrastructure could keep it relevant even if geopolitical tensions ease.

item.title: 🇯🇵 BIG: Japan’s biggest brokers are preparing to sell crypto investment funds. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1zZ2RnaC14X2N3MW41TFMxLWpidzF6b2FVdno5WWJzdzhHSXBqMkhkOGZQTHh3U092MVJPYmk5TVFiM2NOTVpjUEZBeEF4aFhGekttR2lka0Qzc0tvWFlpYmlReXc?oc=5" target="_blank">🇯🇵 BIG: Japan’s biggest broke…

item.title: Michael Saylor floated Bitcoin sales idea to avoid 'impairing' the asset
item.description: Strategy executive chairman Michael Saylor said that continuing to use the “never sell” Bitcoin mantra could ultimately undermine the very asset his company is built around.

item.title: US CLARITY Act will be a ‘boon for domestic innovation’: A16z
item.description: A16z crypto said that when US legal frameworks strike a balance between innovation and consumer protection, the impact tends to ripple through into global markets.

item.title: STRC preferred stock investors are mispricing major 'dislocation' risk: Analyst
item.description: Potential liquidity contractions in secondary markets and surging government bond yields could spell trouble for preferred perpetual stockholders.

item.title: Strategy to repurchase $1.5B of 2029 convertible notes
item.description: The notes carry a 0% coupon, but can be converted into equity in the company if holders choose to redeem their notes for shares.

item.title: Shoutout to the crypto scammers & spammers: thanks to you, we’re banning your entire network today. They've picked friday midnight with a purpose, but they didn't know that I **always** work. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5rY0pvN2xFN2hXRUFkQ2Z2bVdhWTIzMENvbTlYZS1aTkN1Rm41VVZKenBLTEU5Y29iTzU0cmFycFNOLWpQUDlQeFZDOVZUNkxrNlpQcWMtT3Y5Qm8xWURzUHl5SQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Shoutout to the crypto scammers …

item.title: Justin Sun-Led Liberland Micronation Awards Ethereum Founder Vitalik Buterin Its Top Honor
item.description: The micronation honored Vitalik Buterin during ETH Prague 2026 as it continued promoting blockchain-based governance and digital citizenship.

item.title: Bitcoin analysis sees 'bear trap' as BTC price passes two-week lows under $78K
item.description: Bitcoin fell below $78,000 for the first time since the start of May, but traders refused to give up hope of a BTC price rebound coming next.

item.title: Jump Crypto’s ‘Firedancer’ is taking a slow and steady approach to its long-awaited Solana infrastructure rollout
item.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, the lead engineer at Firedancer gives an update on how the new client, also known as a software, is fairing in the Solana ecosystem.

item.title: OpenAI partners with Malta to give all citizens free ChatGPT Plus access
item.description: In a world-first deal, OpenAI and Malta will give all citizens free ChatGPT Plus for a year after they complete a government-backed AI literacy course.

item.title: Crypto users are choosing juicy yields over protection, putting billions at risk of hacks
item.description: DeFi insurance protocols debuted with huge ambitions during the 2020 crypto boom. But as hacks evolved and users chased yields over protection, most of the sector collapsed under the same risks it was built to cover.

item.title: What Is AI Jailbreaking? A Beginner's Guide to the Cat-and-Mouse Game Behind Every Chatbot
item.description: From Cydia to ChatGPT, jailbreaking went from cracking iPhones to liberating LLMs. Here's how it works, who's doing it, and why every AI lab is losing sleep.

item.title: The $293 million KelpDAO hack shows why DeFi is finally being forced to grow up
item.description: For protocol founders and security researchers, the incident reinforced a broader shift underway across crypto: DeFi is no longer primarily battling coding bugs. It’s battling complexity.

item.title: XRP beat bitcoin gains as Clarity Act advanced, but a real bullrun still needs Congress
item.description: The token jumped 5% after a Senate committee moved the market-structure bill forward, reviving hopes that legal clarity can pull deeper institutional money into XRP products.

item.title: Crypto longs lose $500 million as bitcoin slides to $78,000, SOL and XRP down 5%
item.description: A long-skewed liquidation cascade flushed leverage across the major tokens overnight, with the move tracking a global bond selloff and the worst session for U.S. stocks since March.
